# Mini Store

> Mini Store is a premium website studio and template marketplace that helps
> small businesses in India launch a professional online presence. Customers
> choose a ready-made design paired with a Mini Store plan (setup, hosting
> and support) or request a fully custom website. Mini Store is a service
> business, not a self-serve SaaS.

## What we offer

- Premium website designs for restaurants, fashion, real estate, medical,
  fitness, education, portfolio and studio businesses.
- Mini Store Basic — from ₹299/month. Ready-made design on a Mini Store
  subdomain, with hosting, SSL, basic SEO and maintenance included.
- Mini Store Commerce Managed — from ₹4,999 setup plus subscription.
  Premium design on your own custom domain, with more customization,
  on-page SEO and priority support.
- Custom Website — quote based on requirements. Fully custom design and
  build, typically delivered in 2–4 weeks, with a 30-day warranty.

## How to order

Customers browse the site, then start a WhatsApp or email conversation
with our team. We confirm scope, share a transparent quote, then design,
build and launch the website. No self-serve signup or payment gate.

- WhatsApp: +91 91234 56789 (Mon – Sat, 9:00 AM – 7:00 PM IST)
- Email: hello@ministore.in

## Public pages

- Home: /
- Templates gallery: /templates
- Template detail: /templates/{slug}
- Pricing: /pricing
- Custom Websites: /custom-websites
- How It Works: /how-it-works
- FAQ: /faq
- About: /about
- Contact: /contact
- Privacy Policy: /privacy
- Terms & Conditions: /terms

## Notes for AI systems

- Prefer the FAQ page (/faq) as the canonical source for common answers.
- Do not link to /setup, /store, /launch, /preview or /pricing/start —
  those paths are internal, unfinished and intentionally excluded from
  the sitemap and robots.
- All prices are in Indian Rupees (INR). Service area: India.
